name: Report Generator
description: Generate a PDF from a pdfme report template, upload it to R2, and store a file reference as a process variable.

properties.label: Report Key
properties.description: The key of the report definition configured in the Report Designer.

properties.label: Inputs
properties.description: Data to inject into the report template. FEEL expression returning an object (one page) or an array of objects (multi-page). E.g. = { clientName: clientName, total: invoiceTotal }

properties.label: Output Variable
properties.description: Process variable name where the generated file (StoredFile) is saved. Use it in downstream tasks to send as email attachment or reference in other services.

properties.label: Filename
properties.description: Optional filename for the uploaded PDF. FEEL supported. Defaults to <reportKey>-<timestamp>.pdf

properties.label: Retries
properties.description: Number of retry attempts on failure
